jyothi.factors: Quality, moisture content, broken grain percentage

seasonal_trends.harvest_season: Prices drop by 10-15% due to increased supply
seasonal_trends.lean_season: Prices rise by 15-20% due to reduced supply

quality_parameters.moisture_content: Below 14% for safe storage and better price

price_factors.cleanliness: Free from stones, stems increases price

cardamom.auction_prices: Cardamom auctions at Puttady, Kumily determine daily rates
cardamom.export_demand: Strong international demand maintains premium prices

price_determinants.size_weight: Larger, heavier nuts get better prices
price_determinants.water_content: Good water content for tender nuts

factors_affecting_prices.production_estimates: Higher production generally leads to lower prices
factors_affecting_prices.storage_capacity: Limited storage leads to distress selling
factors_affecting_prices.transportation_costs: Fuel prices affect final commodity prices

seasonal_patterns.rice: Prices lowest during harvest (November-February), highest during lean period (June-September)
seasonal_patterns.pepper: Harvest season (February-May) sees price dips, monsoon period relatively stable
seasonal_patterns.coconut: Steady year-round, slight increase during festivals
seasonal_patterns.vegetables: Highly seasonal, monsoon affects supply and prices

market_trends.organic_premium: Organic produce commands 20-50% premium over conventional
market_trends.export_opportunities: Strong demand for spices, rice, coconut products in international markets
market_trends.direct_marketing: Farmers markets, online platforms providing better price realization

quality_improvement.proper_harvesting: Harvest at right maturity for better quality and price
quality_improvement.post_harvest_handling: Proper cleaning, grading, packaging increases value
quality_improvement.certification: Organic, fair trade certifications for premium pricing

market_timing.avoid_glut_period: Don't sell during peak harvest when prices are low
market_timing.festival_marketing: Time sales during festivals for premium prices
market_timing.lean_period_sales: Store and sell during lean period for better prices
market_timing.export_window: Align production with export demand seasons

value_addition.secondary_processing: Converting raw produce to processed products
value_addition.branding: Develop farm/product brand for market differentiation
value_addition.direct_sales: Sell directly to consumers, restaurants, institutions

traditional_markets.local_mandis: Immediate sale but may not get best prices
traditional_markets.wholesale_markets: Better prices but need larger quantities
traditional_markets.commission_agents: Easy sale but commission charges apply

modern_markets.supermarkets: Premium prices but strict quality requirements
modern_markets.online_platforms: Direct consumer access but need packaging/logistics
modern_markets.export_markets: Best prices but quality and regulatory compliance needed

cooperative_marketing.fpo_marketing: Farmer Producer Organizations for collective bargaining
cooperative_marketing.self_help_groups: Small group marketing for better prices

market_intervention.price_support_scheme: Government purchase when prices fall below economic levels
market_intervention.buffer_stock: Maintain strategic reserves to stabilize prices

cardamom.grades: AGEB (Alleppey Green Extra Bold), AGB (Alleppey Green Bold)

rice.basmati: Premium export variety with geographical indication
rice.non_basmati: Parboiled rice, broken rice for various markets

coconut_products.coconut_oil: Virgin coconut oil has premium market in health-conscious countries

government_sources.dam: Department of Agriculture and Marketing state websites
government_sources.commodity_boards: Spices Board, Coconut Development Board price updates

private_sources.trade_associations: All India Rice Exporters Association, Spices Board

digital_platforms.mobile_apps: eNAM, Kisan Suvidha, Crop In for price information
digital_platforms.sms_services: Free SMS services for daily price updates
